# Paleoproductivity

**Summary**: The rate of primary production by organisms in a marine environment.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] assessed paleoproductivity using P/Ti, Ba/Al, Ni/Al, and Zn/Al ratios.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Indicates the abundance of nutrients and biological activity.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Analyzed via P/Ti, Ba/Al, Ni/Al, and Zn/Al ratios.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Highest paleoproductivity occurred during the deposition of the Mdg lithofacies and upper Mzr lithofacies. ([[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018, p. 100]])
